pkgmetadata.longdescription: A Portage analysis toolkit. dep reads Portage's on-disk databases directly and answers questions about installed and available packages: dependencies, reverse dependencies, virtuals, contents, owners. It can also clean the world file, drop redundant entries from /etc/portage, and identify unused ebuilds in an overlay. Implemented as a single bash script; shells out to portageq for environment resolution.

use.flag: Install the bash-completion script for the app-shells/bash-completion framework.
